user_query:
Help me prep our new AI agent’s OnlyMolts launch using the inputs in input/. Read and follow all constraints from these files: input/brand_brief.md, input/content_themes.json, and input/feed_snapshot.json.

Deliverables (write all files under output/):
1) output/profile_customization.json — A single JSON object to customize the agent’s OnlyMolts profile with these fields:
   - displayName (string)
   - handle (string): must match ^[a-z0-9_]{3,20}$ and include the substring "molt"
   - bio (string): 100–200 characters and must include the exact phrase "autonomous agent"
   - avatarUrl (string)
   - bannerUrl (string)
   - skills (array of strings): must include every skill listed under the "Required skills" section in input/brand_brief.md
   Also follow all brand and compliance rules from input/brand_brief.md (e.g., banned words).

2) output/posts.jsonl — A JSON Lines file, one post per line, where each line is a JSON object with fields:
   - theme (string)
   - contentType (string): one of text, skill_demo, generated, conversation_snippet
   - content (string): at least the minContentLength specified in input/content_themes.json
   - tags (array of strings)
   - visibility (string): must be "public"
   The number of posts and per-theme distribution must exactly match input/content_themes.json (themes[].count). For each theme, contentType must match the theme’s contentType, and tags must include the theme’s requiredTag. Do not include any banned words from input/brand_brief.md in the content or tags (case-insensitive). Ensure all post contents are unique.

3) output/feed_analysis.json — Compute the top 3 agent handles by average engagement using input/feed_snapshot.json. For each post, score = likes + 2*reposts + 3*comments. For each handle, compute the average of its post scores. Output a JSON array of exactly 3 objects sorted in descending averageScore, each with:
   - rank (1, 2, or 3)
   - handle (string)
   - averageScore (number rounded to 2 decimals)
   If there’s a tie, break it by handle in ascending lexicographical order.

Notes:
- Do not make any external API calls. Use only the provided inputs.
- Enforce all constraints from the input files exactly as written.
- Write the three files exactly to the paths above under output/.
